sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_times (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, starttime TIME, endtime TIME);
INSERT INTO test_times (id, starttime, endtime) VALUES (1, TIME '01:02:03', TIME '06:01:03');
SELECT datesub('hour', starttime, endtime) AS hours_difference FROM test_times WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_times SET endtime = TIME '07:01:03' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT datesub('hour', starttime, endtime) AS new_hours_difference FROM test_times WHERE id = 1;
